summary: Completed frontend testing of TA Engine Research and Structure tabs. Found multiple critical issues with data-testid attributes, navigation stability, and missing UI components.

ui_bugs.issue: Timeframe buttons work but cause navigation instability, sometimes redirecting to Prediction page
Overlay buttons with required data-testid not found (overlay-fib, overlay-pattern, overlay-setup, overlay-ta)
Pattern cards with data-testid='pattern-card' not found
Structure tab navigation unstable, frequently redirects back to Prediction page
TA Explorer panel with data-testid='ta-explorer-panel' not found
TA Explorer tabs not accessible (tab-patterns, tab-layers, tab-trade)
Pattern Lifecycle filtering section not found
Analysis tab with 10 layers (layer-1 to layer-10) not accessible

integration_issues.issue: Clicking tabs causes unexpected navigation to different pages

passed_tests: All main tabs are present (Research, Structure, Signals, Execution, Deep)
Core Insight section displays text when analysis completes
Basic navigation to Tech Analysis works
29 elements with data-testid found on page
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Multiple data-testid attributes are missing from key UI components. The overlay buttons (overlay-fib, overlay-pattern, overlay-setup, overlay-ta), pattern cards, TA Explorer panel, and 10 layers are not accessible with expected data-testid selectors. Structure tab navigation is unstable and frequently redirects to Prediction page. These issues prevent proper testing of the required functionality.

success_percentage.research_tab: 30% - Basic elements present but missing critical data-testid attributes
success_percentage.structure_tab: 10% - Major navigation and component accessibility issues
success_percentage.overall: 20% - Core functionality present but implementation incomplete
